objective: Implement the independently verifiable F-0096 secure-read and retention partition without claiming finding closure: allow only the existing super_admin/content_admin paper-asset boundary to download an existing private local paper_asset by public ID with no-store, nosniff, exact content type and safe attachment disposition; fail closed when metadata or bytes are missing; expose the action in the content-admin paper detail; and prohibit paper_asset metadata deletion unless the owning paper is still draft. Do not change attachment usage values, upload limits, physical deletion/outbox, schema or migration in this partition.
blockedFiles: schema, migration or persistent database execution
upload size/type policy or streaming ingestion change
physical file deletion, delete outbox or reference-count lifecycle
new role, entitlement, anonymous or learner download
dependency, Provider, external service, secret/env, deployment, PR or force-push
F-0097, F-0098 or another independent finding

authoritativeChainEvidence.uiApiCaller: AdminPaperDetailPage already receives the protected paper_asset list but only renders metadata. It is the direct content-admin read surface for an authenticated download action.
authoritativeChainEvidence.routeService: The paper composition runtime already enforces super_admin/content_admin for paper_asset collection/detail. A nested GET download route can reuse exactly that actor boundary while keeping objectKey out of JSON DTOs.
authoritativeChainEvidence.repository: findPaperAssetByPublicId already joins paper and returns private object metadata. deletePaperAsset currently deletes by asset ID alone; joining the owner and requiring paper.status=draft is the minimal retention guard.
authoritativeChainEvidence.storage: Local storage already validates content-addressed object keys on write. The read path must resolve the same five-segment identity inside the configured root and stream bytes without exposing the key.
authoritativeChainEvidence.tests: Existing service/runtime/storage/admin UI tests are the direct mocks and regression boundaries; delete audit static tests protect transactional audit behavior.
authoritativeChainEvidence.requirements: Module 02 section 3.9 requires content-admin download, learner non-exposure and published attachment retention.
authoritativeChainEvidence.nonClaims: F-0031 upload saga already covers durable create/replay. This task does not resolve the remaining six-purpose enum, ingestion size/type policy or durable physical deletion, so F-0096 stays open.

resumeAnchor.task: paper asset secure download and published retention foundation
resumeAnchor.condition: F-0094 closed at f42a9fed; guardian task-bound permission approval is active; F-0096 remains open after this partial closeout
